stemHtml: The Basic Empty Mass of an aircraft is recorded in…

options.a: the loading manifest. It differs from Dry Operating Mass by the value of the traffic load.
options.b: the weighing schedule and is amended to take account of changes due to modifications of the aircraft.
options.c: the loading manifest. It differs from the Zero Fuel Mass by the value of the traffic load.
options.d: the weighing schedule. If changes occur, due to modifications, the aircraft must be re-weighed always.
